top_signals.title: Mongolia Reaffirms One China Policy at Meeting, China Says
top_signals.summary: Mongolian President Khurelsukh Ukhnaa said Mongolia firmly adheres to the One China principle in a meeting with China’s Foreign Minister Wang Yi in Ulaanbaatar on June 13, according to a statement from China’s Foreign Ministry.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: AI is disrupting investment

top_signals.title: Borderlands Mexico: Laredo summit debates driverless freight corridors, B-1 trucker alternatives
top_signals.summary:
This week in Borderlands Mexico: Laredo summit debates driverless freight corridors; Cadogan Tate expands Southwest footprint with Phoenix acquisition; and Toyo plans $357M solar manufacturing expansion in Houston.

The post Borderlands Mexico: Laredo summit debates driverless freight corridors, B-1 trucker alternatives appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Switzerland Asks If 10 Million People Is Where to Draw the Line
top_signals.summary: A Swiss plebiscite Sunday on whether to impose a population ceiling is offering voters a choice that threatens to become their most consequential yet of the current century.
